rationale: No events this cycle directly or meaningfully affect Portugal; energy and cost-of-living signals remain background noise.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to deal
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal could marginally ease European energy prices, offering slight indirect benefit to Portuguese households, but no final agreement yet.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Incremental diplomatic progress on Iran could stabilize global oil markets slightly, with minor indirect benefit for Portugal's energy-sensitive economy.
